metadata.title: Mik Server - Creative Casual Server
metadata.description: A creative casual Minecraft server that allows any mods, focused on building creation

pcl2Page.title: PCL2 Homepage
pcl2Page.description:
1. Settings -> Personalization -> Custom homepage
2. Click “Online update”
3. Enter the address below in the download address field
4. Return to the launcher home page and you're done!

hero.title: Mik Causual
hero.description: A Minecraft non-profit, casual creation server where you can leave your masterpieces.

showcase.title: Show the server before explaining it.
showcase.description: After the hero, the page leads with the world, builds, map, and joining path through image-led Minecraft cards instead of long copy blocks.

builds.title: Long-term builds and player work
builds.description: From central areas to personal projects, each build can become part of the server archive.

map.title: Live map
map.description: Open the online map to view the world, coordinates, and active areas.

wiki.title: Wiki and rules
wiki.description: Browse server commands, rules, help, and all kinds of useful information here.

records.title: Public records
records.description: Moderation and ban records are publicly available.

community.title: Casual creative community
community.description: Less about short-term hype, more about long-term play, collaboration, and lasting work.

about.title: A Minecraft community built around building and long-term play.
about.description: Mik cares about a stable world, clear rules, player collaboration, and every project worth preserving in the server archive.
about.detail: It is not a one-off event or a pure utility server; it is a shared world that keeps growing over time.

explore.title: Start understanding the server here.
explore.description: Buildings, documentation, map access, and public records are placed clearly so you can learn the community before diving into details.

buildings.title: Building Gallery
buildings.description: Browse player builds and long-term server projects.

wiki.title: Wiki Docs
wiki.description: Read rules, tutorials, joining steps, and frequently asked questions.

map.title: Server Map
map.description: Open the live map to view the world and player locations.

bans.title: Ban Records
bans.description: View public moderation and ban records.

builds.title: Let player work become the homepage lead.
builds.description: The v0 establishes a gallery entry point; real screenshots and selected projects can be added next.
builds.panelDescription: Browse submitted buildings, authors, tags, and project notes. Once real screenshots are ready, this can become a large visual gallery.

join.title: Enter the community in three steps.

rules.title: Read the rules
rules.description: Understand community boundaries, build protection, and collaboration expectations.

client.title: Prepare your client
client.description: Confirm your version, mods, and tools match the server guide.

apply.title: Submit application
apply.description: Once approved, you can enter the server and start building.

live.title: Announcements, status, and live players.
live.description: These details remain available, but now support the project story instead of leading the page.

creativeFreedom.title: Creative Casual Experience
creativeFreedom.description: The server allows any mods (including hacks) and supports powerful building tools like Axiom and WorldEdit. We are committed to providing maximum freedom for building creators, letting your creativity run wild without restrictions.

curatedCommunity.title: Curated Player Community
curatedCommunity.description: Through our application system, we carefully select every player who joins the server to ensure a friendly and harmonious community atmosphere. Here, you will meet a group of quality players who love building creation and respect others' works.

meta.title: Building Gallery
meta.description: Showcasing amazing building works by our players

hero.title: Building Gallery
hero.description: Showcasing amazing building works by our players

hero.description: The page you requested may have been moved, removed, or the link is incorrect.
